title: lewisia cotyledon var. howellii
intro: Lewisia cotyledon var. howellii, also known as Howell's lewisia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the portulacaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Howell's lewisia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other health issues.
